summary.en: Practice ConfigMaps, Secrets, requests, limits, quotas, RBAC, ServiceAccounts, SecurityContext, capabilities, and CRDs.
summary.fr: Pratique ConfigMaps, Secrets, requests, limits, quotas, RBAC, ServiceAccounts, SecurityContext, capabilities et CRDs.

hint.en: Create ConfigMap app-settings MODE=prod, Secret db-secret PASSWORD=ckad-pass, then run Pod secure-app with envFrom both.
hint.fr: Cree ConfigMap app-settings MODE=prod, Secret db-secret PASSWORD=ckad-pass, puis lance Pod secure-app avec envFrom pour les deux.

hint.en: ResourceQuota compute-quota, LimitRange container-defaults (with cpu + memory defaults), and Deployment limited-api must all exist in ckad-sec.
hint.fr: ResourceQuota compute-quota, LimitRange container-defaults (avec defauts cpu + memoire), et Deployment limited-api doivent exister dans ckad-sec.

hint.en: Bind ServiceAccount reader to Role pod-reader. It should list pods, but not delete them.
hint.fr: Lie le ServiceAccount reader au Role pod-reader. Il doit lister les pods, mais pas les supprimer.

title.fr: Durcir le security context d'un Pod

hint.en: Use nginxinc/nginx-unprivileged:1.27, runAsNonRoot true, seccomp RuntimeDefault, allowPrivilegeEscalation false, drop ALL capabilities.
hint.fr: Utilise nginxinc/nginx-unprivileged:1.27, runAsNonRoot true, seccomp RuntimeDefault, allowPrivilegeEscalation false, drop ALL capabilities.

hint.en: Create CRD widgets.ckad.dev, then create Widget sample in namespace ckad-sec with spec.size=small.
hint.fr: Cree la CRD widgets.ckad.dev, puis un Widget sample dans ckad-sec avec spec.size=small.
